findings.message: Response scanning action is "warn" — consider 'block' or 'ask' for enforcement
MCP tool scanning is disabled — tool poisoning and rug-pull attacks won't be detected
MCP tool policy is disabled — no pre-execution rules on tool calls
MCP input scanning is disabled — agent-to-server DLP and injection checks are off
MCP session binding is disabled — tool inventory changes mid-session won't be detected
No kill switch sources configured — no emergency stop capability
Adaptive enforcement is disabled — no automatic escalation on suspicious patterns
Tool chain detection is disabled — multi-step attack sequences won't trigger alerts
Sandbox is not enabled — agent processes run without containment
